versions.version_description: Intermediate Difficulty with some more complex chords than other versions.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: I Dont Want To Miss A Thing

content:
Bon Jovi - Always (Crossroads 1994)
posted by Luc Bien
please send comments or corrections to irritantjochie@hotmail.com

Chords used:

         EADGBe
[ch]Ab[/ch]:      466544
[ch]A7[/ch]:      *02020
[ch]Bb[/ch]:      113331
[ch]Bbsus2[/ch]:  113311
[ch]C[/ch]:       *32010
[ch]Cadd2[/ch]:   *32030
[ch]Cm[/ch]:      335543
[ch]C7[/ch]:      *32310
[ch]C/E[/ch]:     032010
[ch]C/G[/ch]:     332010
[ch]Dm[/ch]:      557765
[ch]Eb[/ch]:      668886
[ch]F[/ch]:       133211
[ch]Gm[/ch]:      355333


[Intro]

[ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
[ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
this romeo is bleeding[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd2[/ch]
but you can't see his blood[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
it's nothing but some peanuts[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A7[/ch]              
that this old dog kicked up[/tab]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
it's been raining since you left me[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
now I'm drowning in the flood[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
you see I've always been a fighter[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A7[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
but without you I give up[/tab]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
now I can't sing a love song[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C/E[/ch]
like the way it's meant to be[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bb[/ch] 
well, I guess I'm not that good anymore[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C7[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]
but baby, that's just me[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C7[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]      
yeah, I will love you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]     [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  
baby - Always[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]C7[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch] 
and I'll be there forever and a day -[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Always[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
I'll be there till the stars don't shine[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C/G[/ch]
till the heavens burst and[/tab]

the words don't rhyme
[tab]            [ch]Bb[/ch]
and I know when I die, you'll be on my mind[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]    
and I love you [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch]
Always[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
now you're pictures that you left behind[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd2[/ch]
are just memories of a different life[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
some that made us laugh, some that made us cry[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]A7[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]                                          
one that made you have to say goodbye[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
what I'd give to run my fingers through your hair[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Cadd2[/ch]     
to touch your lips, to hold you here[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]              
when you say your prayers try to understand[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A7[/ch]                     [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
I've made mistakes, I'm just a man[/tab]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
when he holds you close, when he pulls you near[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/E[/ch]
when he says the words you've been needing to hear[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
I'll wish I was him 'cause those words are mine[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C7[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]
to say to you till the end of time[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C7[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Gm[/ch]
yeah, I will love you baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Always[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]C7[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]
and I'll be there forever and a day -[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Always[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                  [ch]Ab[/ch]
if you told me to cry for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]Eb[/ch]
I could[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Ab[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]                   
if you told me to die for you[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Cm[/ch]
I would[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]Ab[/ch]
take a look at my face[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]
there's no price I won't pay[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
to say these words to you[/tab]


[Solo]

[ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch] 
well, there ain't no luck[/tab]
in these loaded dice
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]
but baby if you give me just one more try[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bb[/ch]
we can pack up our old dreams[/tab]
and our old lives
[tab]       [ch]C/E[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]  
we'll find a place where the sun still shines[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]      
yeah, I will love you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]     [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] 
baby - Always[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]C7[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]
and I'll be there forever and a day -[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Always[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
I'll be there till the stars don't shine[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C/G[/ch]
till the heavens burst and[/tab]
the words don't rhyme
[tab]            [ch]Bb[/ch]
and I know when I die, you'll be on my mind[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]
and I love you [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]     
Always[/tab]


[Outro]

[tab][ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] 
(repeat and fade)[/tab]
